query:
SELECT ticker, currentPrice, ytdStartPrice, ytdPerformance, currency 
FROM stocks 
WHERE ytdStartPrice IS NOT NULL AND ytdStartPrice > 0 
LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2w4G5FWonHi6U6L.root --database aQvizP6Ne8LKEmBGrk5vq4 --execute SELECT ticker, currentPrice, ytdStartPrice, ytdPerformance, currency 
FROM stocks 
WHERE ytdStartPrice IS NOT NULL AND ytdStartPrice > 0 
LIMIT 10;
